incident_summary: Database connection pool configuration change caused threat detection service degradation in EU region for approximately 2 hours 20 minutes at SEV-2 severity, resulting in delayed threat processing for 142 customers

root_cause.summary: Database connection pool configuration change deployed at 14:10 UTC did not account for regional infrastructure connection limits in EU region, causing connection pool exhaustion
root_cause.trigger: Production deployment of database connection pool configuration update completed at 14:10 UTC
root_cause.mechanism: Updated connection timeout settings (5s to 30s) and retry logic caused connection pool exhaustion in EU region database cluster due to regional infrastructure connection limits, leading to database timeouts and failed threat processing

customer_impact.description: Customers in the EU region experienced significant delays in threat detection and processing. Security threats were still being detected and queued but processed much slower than normal. No threats were missed and no data was lost.
affected_functionality: Threat detection processing speed in EU region
Real-time threat analysis in EU region
unaffected_functionality: Threat detection in US and Asia-Pacific regions

resolution.action_taken: Manual failover initiated to backup database cluster at 14:35 UTC, followed by connection pool settings adjustment for regional infrastructure limits at 16:35 UTC
resolution.confirmed_by: CloudWatch logs showing database cluster healthy status at 16:40 UTC, error rate returned to baseline 0.6% at 16:45 UTC, throughput restored to 1.24e+03 at 16:45 UTC

root_cause: Slack thread confirmation by alice.sre at 16:45 UTC
GitHub deployment at 14:10 UTC to threat-detection-service
CloudWatch logs showing DB_TIMEOUT errors starting 14:25 UTC
Slack discussion by charlie.infra at 14:35 UTC linking deployment to issue
timeline: Prometheus metrics showing error rate anomaly start at 14:25 UTC
CloudWatch first error log at 14:25 UTC
customer_impact: CloudWatch log at 14:30 UTC showing 142 affected customers
Slack messages by bob.security at 14:45 UTC and 15:30 UTC describing delayed threat processing
Prometheus metrics showing EU region only affected, US region stable

data_gaps: Exact number of threats delayed or queued during incident
Maximum delay time experienced by customers
Whether Asia-Pacific region (ap-southeast-2) mentioned in Slack was also confirmed unaffected in metrics data
Specific connection limit values for EU regional infrastructure
Whether rollback was considered or only failover/adjustment approach used
